series_metadata.series_title: Planning and Design Drawings-State Owned Buildings
series_metadata.series_description: Drawings and floorplans for DAS managed buildings; programs of requirements; tenant improvement documents; contractor quotes; contractor bids; construction permits; occupancy data; certificates of occupancy.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until electronically stored, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years after building is sold or transferred, then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
